title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.200 - Evidence to establish demand
text:
426.200.  Evidence to establish demand. — The assignee shall require such evidence, and no other, of the justice of such demands, as is required to establish demands of a similar character in the circuit court in suits between the original parties to the contract.
(RSMo 1939 § 5758) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5648; 1919 § 644; 1909 § 917
